params.name: status
params.description: Supported values: Unknown, SendDisabled, Restoring, Renaming, ReceiveDisabled, Disabled, Deleting, Creating, Active

params.name: responseVariable
params.description: The target variable in which the output of the operation will be stored

params.name: overwriteBody
params.description: Replace the Message Body in Message Context with the output payload of the operation (This will remove the payload from the above variable. But other elements such as headers and attributes will remain).
